name: 5150 Martial Arts
tagline: The #1 Jiu Jitsu Academy in Rockland, NY

home.heroHeadline: The #1 Jiu Jitsu Academy in Rockland, NY
home.heroSubtext: Transform your life with world-class Gracie Jiu-Jitsu training in Rockland, NY. Perfect for all ages and skill levels, our classes build strength, self-discipline, and real-world self-defense skills in a supportive, family-friendly environment.

trialSteps.text: Click the "Book Your Free Class" button and fill out the form.
Choose your class calendar and pick a date & time.
You'll get an email and SMS confirmation with all the details.

home.valueProp: Jiu Jitsu Classes for Kids & Adults — Build Confidence and Life Skills Safely!
home.valuePropSubtext: Discover safe and effective martial arts training for kids and adults. Our expert-led programs boost confidence, self-esteem, character, and social skills in a fun, supportive environment. Perfect for all ages and skill levels!

programsOverview.name: Adults Gracie Jiu-Jitsu
programsOverview.description: Enhance your fitness, cardiovascular health, and self-defense skills with Adult Gracie Jiu-Jitsu. Our expert-led classes provide a fun, engaging way to boost strength, flexibility, and overall well-being.

programsOverview.name: Kids Gracie Jiu-Jitsu
programsOverview.description: Our Kids Gracie Jiu-Jitsu program develops strength, discipline, and leadership in a fun, safe, and supportive environment.

programsOverview.name: Tiny Sharks — Parent & Me
programsOverview.description: This interactive class promotes physical, mental, and emotional development, helping children build self-control, coordination, balance, and social skills while having fun with their parents!

programsOverview.name: Adult Kickboxing
programsOverview.description: Join our 5150 kickboxing classes to enhance your fitness with a dynamic mix of striking techniques. Our fun and challenging workouts help you get in shape, stay active, and build strength while mastering essential kickboxing skills.

testimonials.name: Darren Shinton
testimonials.quote: My daughter loves this place. I can't speak highly enough of the staff who make it both educational and very fun for all the kids.

testimonials.name: Richard Horvath
testimonials.quote: Great place to train, workout and connect with people. The professors really work to meet you where you are, and they take a personal interest in their students. If you have ever thought about trying Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu this is the place to go.

testimonials.name: Elvin Abordo
testimonials.quote: Great students. Great professors. Couldn't ask for a more welcoming environment.

testimonials.name: Kimberly
testimonials.quote: This place and the staff is absolutely remarkable. They are truly amazing with the children and I wouldn't go anywhere else but here for Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu for my child or myself. We go about 3 to 4 times a week. I wouldn't have it any other way.

testimonials.name: Karina
testimonials.quote: My family has been attending 5150 for over a year now. It's become more than a martial arts academy; it's a true second family. Professors O'Keeffe and Shapiro are wonderful instructors who genuinely care for not only skill development, but also the wellbeing of everyone that's part of 5150.

testimonials.name: Lori Adams
testimonials.quote: Professor Shapiro, Professor O'Keeffe & staff are amazing! They wonderfully train with the kids while keeping them focused. The facility is spotless. We love attending class... started last January but WISH WE STARTED EARLIER!!!

programs.heading: Our Programs
programs.intro: Four expert-led programs built to fit every age, skill level, and training goal — from Tiny Sharks to serious adult grapplers.

serviceList.name: Adults Gracie Jiu-Jitsu
serviceList.description: Enhance your fitness, cardiovascular health, and self-defense skills with Adult Gracie Jiu-Jitsu. Our expert-led classes provide a fun, engaging way to boost strength, flexibility, and overall well-being.

adults-gracie-jiu-jitsu.heading: Adults Gracie Jiu-Jitsu
adults-gracie-jiu-jitsu.subhead: World-class grappling for adults of every level
adults-gracie-jiu-jitsu.bodyText: Our Adult Gracie Jiu-Jitsu program is built for real-world self-defense and real-world fitness. You'll learn leverage-based technique, live grappling, and the proven Gracie system — in an environment that's welcoming to day-one beginners and serious competitors alike. Expect to leave every class stronger, calmer, and sharper than when you walked in.
benefits: Real-world self-defense skills that work under pressure
Stress relief and sharper mental focus
A tight-knit training community that keeps you accountable

kids-gracie-jiu-jitsu.heading: Kids Gracie Jiu-Jitsu
kids-gracie-jiu-jitsu.subhead: Confidence, discipline, and life skills — on the mats
kids-gracie-jiu-jitsu.bodyText: Our Kids Gracie Jiu-Jitsu program develops strength, discipline, and leadership in a fun, safe, and supportive environment. Kids leave every class a little more confident, a little more focused, and a lot more capable of handling whatever school, bullies, or life throws at them.
benefits: Builds real confidence — not by winning, by showing up
Discipline, focus, and respect that carry into school and home
Structured belt progression so kids see measurable growth

tiny-sharks.heading: Tiny Sharks — Parent & Me
tiny-sharks.subhead: Their first martial arts class, with you on the mat
tiny-sharks.bodyText: Tiny Sharks is an interactive class built for our youngest students and their parents. It promotes physical, mental, and emotional development — helping children build self-control, coordination, balance, and social skills while having fun with Mom or Dad right alongside them.
benefits: Bond with your child through movement and play
Build coordination, balance, and body awareness
Early focus and listening skills in a structured environment
Gentle, age-appropriate intro to martial arts fundamentals

adult-kickboxing.heading: Adult Kickboxing
adult-kickboxing.subhead: Striking, conditioning, and a cardio workout that doesn't feel like cardio
adult-kickboxing.bodyText: Our adult kickboxing program is a dynamic mix of striking techniques, conditioning drills, and partner work that gets you in the best shape of your life without ever touching a treadmill. Whether you want to shed pounds, build striking skills, or just punch the stress of the week into a pad — this is the class.
benefits: Learn real striking mechanics — jab, cross, hook, kick
Improve coordination, reflexes, and mental toughness
Zero contact required — train at your own intensity

instructors.heading: Meet Your Instructors
instructors.subhead: Learn from the best coaches in Nyack, New York

team.name: Prof. Scott O'Keeffe
team.bio: Professor Scott O'Keeffe is one of the founding professors at 5150 Martial Arts. His teaching philosophy blends old-school Gracie fundamentals with a modern, problem-solving approach that meets each student where they are — whether you've never trained a day in your life or you're prepping for competition.

team.name: Prof. Irene Shapiro
team.bio: Professor Irene Shapiro is known for her technical precision, patience, and deep connection with every student who steps onto her mat. Students credit her with turning 5150 into a true second family — not just a martial arts school.

team.name: Prof. Kristofer Hardin
team.bio: Professor Kristofer Hardin brings years of high-level grappling experience to the 5150 mats. He's the coach who'll push your technique to the next level while making sure every round stays sharp, safe, and productive.

class-schedule.heading: Class Schedule
class-schedule.subhead: Seven days a week — morning, afternoon, and evening slots for every program
class-schedule.intro: We run over 30 classes per week across all four programs. Click any class to book your free trial. Full schedule subject to change on holidays — check our Instagram or give us a call to confirm.
class-schedule.scheduleNote: Full live schedule available after you book your free class. Our team will walk you through exactly which class slots fit your goals and availability.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.subhead: Call us, email us, or just come walk through the door — we're here seven days a week.
contact.businessHours: Open 7 days a week — full class schedule sent after booking

designReasoning: 5150 Martial Arts serves a broad family audience (kids 3–5 through adult competitors) with a modern, accessible Gracie Jiu-Jitsu program and kickboxing. Performance-athletic fits: bold sportswear-brand energy, kinetic marquees, and one electric accent — strong, inclusive, and family-friendly without leaning too pro-fighter (no real fighter roster) or too heritage (the school reads modern/accessible, not multi-decade legacy).
currentSiteIssues: GoHighLevel template with a disjointed color story (bright blue-violet against unbranded grey backgrounds), weak hero hierarchy, no real instructor photos, video/marquee elements that don't autoplay cleanly, underdeveloped program-detail pages, repetitive reviews section on every page, and no clear trust/credibility anchoring on the homepage. Mobile layout stacks poorly and the booking flow is a single long form (no staged 2-step funnel).
